set(kspin_sources
    kspin.cpp)

set(kspin_headers
    kspin.h
    kspin.hpp)

set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -stdlib=libc++ --std=c++17 -Wall")

add_library(kspin STATIC ${kspin_sources})
